sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: MANULIFE FINANCIAL CORP의 공시는 사업·재무 업데이트와 주요 확인사항을 제공합니다.

keyPoints.text: MANULIFE FINANCIAL CORP는 최근 사업·재무 업데이트를 공시했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 위험요인 또는 공시 본문은 규제, 사업 운영, 계약 구조 관련 불확실성을 확인합니다.

businessChanges.text: 사업 및 영업 검토는 제품, 시장, 매출 구조 또는 운영 업데이트를 설명합니다.

financialHighlights.text: 공시는 실적, 배당, 매출 또는 재무 업데이트 관련 내용을 제공합니다.

watchItems.text: 향후 확인할 점은 이번 공시의 사업 업데이트가 다음 실적과 현금흐름으로 이어지는지입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 newsrelease-s3s4resultsifc.htm EX-99.1 Document EXHIBIT 99.1 News Release C$ unless otherwise stated TSX/NYSE/PSE: MFC SEHK: 945 For Immediate Release June 5, 2026 Manulife Financial Corporation announces results of Conversion Privileges of Class 1 Preferred Shares, Series 3 and Series 4 TORONTO – Manulife Financial Corporation (“Manulife”) today announced that after having taken into account all election notices received by the June 4, 2026 deadline for conversion, 17,750 of its currently outstanding 6,537,903 Non-cumulative Rate Reset Class 1 Shares Series 3 (the “Series 3 Preferred Shares”) have been elected for conversion on June 19, 2026, on a one-for-one basis, into Non-cumulative Floating Rate Class 1 Shares Series 4 of Manulife (the “Series 4 Preferred Shares"), and 886,331 of its currently outstanding 1,462,097 Series 4 Preferred Shares have been elected for conversion

June 19, 2026, holders of Series 3 Preferred Shares will be entitled to receive fixed rate non-cumulative preferential cash dividends on a quarterly basis, as and when declared by the Board of Directors of Manulife (the “Board”) and subject to the provisions of the Insurance Companies Act (Canada). The dividend rate for the five-year period commencing on June 20, 2026, and ending on June 19, 2031, will be 4.64000% per annum or $0.290000 per share per quarter, being equal to the sum of the five-year Government of Canada bond yield as at May 21, 2026, plus 1.41%, as determined in accordance with the terms of the Series 3 Preferred Shares. The Series 3 Preferred Shares and the Series 4 Preferred Shares have not been and will not be registered in the United States under the United States Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the “Securities Act”), or the securities laws of any state of the  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.290000 = 0.290000달러.

qualityFlags: Financial data reflects 2026-06-05 foreign issuer report

generation.costPolicy: Self/session provider: artifact text supplied by the active agent session; no external API quota used.
